content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord Daily Update (Apr 11, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 11, 2026, focused on configuration management for Discord agents and ongoing community discussions regarding external API integrations for agent-based economic decision-making.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **Configuration Management**
    *   Initiated a fix to ensure the Discord plugin correctly respects the `MILADY_DISCORD_OWNER_USER_IDS_JSON` environment setting. See [#47](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/pull/47).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#47](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/pull/47): fix: respect explicit MILADY_DISCORD_OWNER_USER_IDS_JSON setting. This PR is currently open and awaiting review.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#6646](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/6646) Real-world x402 API for agent builders**
    *   Community members discussed the integration of the DeepBlue x402 API for agent-based economic decision-making, specifically regarding Polymarket odds and BTC signals.
    *   Participants explored the potential for "coordination-signal" endpoints to assist agents in Schelling games and multi-agent consensus scenarios.
    *   The discussion highlighted the "wallet as credential" philosophy, emphasizing reduced onboarding friction for AI agents.
